summary: Comprehensive testing of expanded Cosmic Mixer with multi-select layers and Cosmic Ledger page. All features working correctly. Cosmic Mixer now has 15 frequencies (was 9), 11 ambient sounds (was 5), 18 mantras (was 6), and 16 world instruments (was 6). Multi-select functionality verified for frequencies, sounds, and instruments. Cosmic Ledger page loads with all 4 tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React warning 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in CosmicLedger.js - not blocking but should be addressed for clean console
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All expanded Cosmic Mixer features verified: 1) Full-page mixer at /cosmic-mixer has 15 frequencies (including new 285 Hz, 432 Hz, 10 Hz, 40 Hz, 111 Hz, 1111 Hz), 11 ambient sounds (including Thunder, Stream, Forest, Cave, Night, Waterfall), 18 mantras (including Gayatri, Gate Gate, Lokah Samastah, Hu, Shema, Allah Hu, Nam Myoho Renge Kyo, Waheguru, Ho'oponopono, I Am Abundance, Ham Sa, Om Tare Tuttare), and 16 world instruments (including Oud, Harmonium, Shakuhachi, Koto, Hang Drum, Cello, Tibetan Horn, Harp, Kalimba, Bagpipe). 2) Multi-select working for frequencies, sounds, and instruments - shows 'X layered' text. 3) Stop All button clears all layers. 4) Cosmic Ledger at /cosmic-ledger loads with Overview, Achievements, Legendary Paths, Leaderboard tabs. 5) Light Therapy and Haptic Vibration sections present on mixer page.

frequencies_section.new_frequencies: PASS - All 6 new frequencies found: 285 Hz, 432 Hz, 10 Hz, 40 Hz, 111 Hz, 1111 Hz

ambient_sounds_section.new_sounds: PASS - All 6 new sounds found: Thunder, Stream, Forest, Cave, Night, Waterfall

mantras_section.new_mantras: PASS - All 12 new mantras found: Gayatri, Gate Gate, Lokah Samastah, Hu, Shema, Allah Hu, Nam Myoho Renge Kyo, Waheguru, Ho'oponopono, I Am Abundance, Ham Sa, Om Tare Tuttare

world_instruments_section.new_instruments: PASS - All 10 new instruments found: Oud, Harmonium, Shakuhachi, Koto, Hang Drum, Cello, Tibetan Horn, Harp, Kalimba, Bagpipe

cosmic_mixer_page.multi_select_frequencies: PASS - Can activate multiple frequencies (396 Hz + 528 Hz), shows '2 frequencies layered' text
cosmic_mixer_page.multi_select_sounds: PASS - Can activate multiple sounds (Rain + Ocean), shows '2 sounds layered' text
cosmic_mixer_page.multi_select_instruments: PASS - Can activate multiple instruments (Sitar + Tanpura), shows '2 instruments layered' text
cosmic_mixer_page.stop_all_button: PASS - Stop All button clears all active layers
cosmic_mixer_page.light_therapy_section: PASS - 6 light modes visible (Sunrise Glow, Aurora, Calm Blue, Healing Green, Violet Flame, Golden Light)
cosmic_mixer_page.haptic_vibration_section: PASS - Enable Haptic Pulse button visible

cosmic_ledger_page.title: PASS - 'Cosmic Ledger' title with 'Universal Profile | X/21 Achievements' subtitle
cosmic_ledger_page.tabs: PASS - All 4 tabs visible: Overview, Achievements, Legendary Paths, Leaderboard

overview_tab.stats_grid: PASS - Shows Total XP, Max Level, Origins, Gems, Equipment, Bosses Slain, Crafted, Radiates Received, Radiates Given
overview_tab.active_origins: PASS - Shows Active Origins (4/6) with Pleiadian, Sirian, Arcturian, Lyran badges
overview_tab.recent_achievements: PASS - Shows Recent Achievements with earned badges (First Steps, Dual Origin)

cosmic_ledger_page.back_button: PASS - Back button present for navigation
